subject: Shared mailbox access request
body: Operations manager needs access to billing@northwind.example for statement review. Please confirm permissions and avoid granting full tenant admin rights.

subject: VPN connects but line-of-business app will not load
body: Attorney can connect to VPN from home, but the case management app times out. DNS and route checks are needed before escalation.

subject: P1 alert: warehouse label printers offline
body: Multiple shipping label printers in the warehouse are offline after a switch reboot. Dispatch needs a short internal note and a client-safe update draft.
